places.address: Charoen Krung 24, Talat Noi, Bangkok

places.name: Karo Coffee Roasters
places.near: BTS/taxi to Watthana area; confirm exact branch
places.order: Pour-over, espresso, seasonal beans
places.notes: Selected for specialty credibility in Watthana.
places.famousFor: Listed among strong Watthana coffee shops by coffee-focused guides.
places.goodToKnow: Good for coffee-first visit; verify hours and seating.

places.name: Rolling Roasters Ekkamai
places.near: BTS Ekkamai + taxi/walk
places.order: Espresso, filter coffee, beans
places.notes: Included for roaster-led coffee in Ekkamai.

places.goodToKnow: Good as part of Ekkamai coffee route; verify latest branch.

places.name: Samadool Coffee
places.near: Taxi/BTS to Watthana area; confirm branch
places.order: Pour-over, espresso, iced coffee
places.notes: Selected as niche specialty coffee option.
places.famousFor: Coffee-focused shop listed in Watthana specialty coffee guides.
places.goodToKnow: Smaller specialty pick; confirm hours before making a special trip.

places.name: Monochrome Silom
places.near: BTS Sala Daeng / MRT Silom; taxi/walk
places.order: Iced latte, espresso, dessert if available
places.notes: Useful aesthetic coffee stop around Silom.
places.famousFor: Listed among good Bangkok cafés for coffee lovers; useful in Silom area.
places.goodToKnow: Good if already in Silom; verify dessert ingredients.

places.name: Homey Coffee near Wat Pho
places.near: Walk from Wat Pho / MRT Sanam Chai
places.order: Iced latte, Thai coffee, simple pastries
places.notes: Good temple-route refreshment stop.
places.famousFor: Convenient coffee stop near the Reclining Buddha/Wat Pho temple area.
places.goodToKnow: Convenience pick, not a destination café; verify current location/hours.

places.name: Slowmov Cafe
places.near: MRT/BTS/taxi depending route; better by taxi
places.order: Coffee drinks, desserts
places.notes: Included for area diversity beyond Sukhumvit/Siam.
places.famousFor: Listed among Bangkok coffee lover cafés; useful if exploring northern Bangkok/Bang Sue.
places.goodToKnow: Not central; visit only if nearby or café-hopping.

places.name: Coffee Toys at Bang Nam Phueng Floating Market
places.near: Taxi + ferry/private car to Bang Kachao; market is weekend-focused
places.order: Iced coffee, local snacks; check ingredients
places.notes: Good practical coffee stop during nature-market day.

places.goodToKnow: Weekend market area; verify hours; ask about ingredients for no pork.
places.address: Bang Nam Phueng Floating Market area, Samut Prakan
